response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and team mentorship
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with demonstrated cross-platform adaptability
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentoring
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as required
Absence of documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning at scale
